title: B'karr
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Bkarr.jpg|A B'karr.|thumb]]

'''B'karri''' (singular '''b'karr'''), also known as '''lizard-rats''', were [[Reptomammal/Legends|reptomammals]] native to [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]].<ref name="SotE">''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
